name: Pasta with Peppers
recipeIngredient: 2 Sweet Red or Yellow Peppers, seeded - slice into thin strips
1/2 cup Fresh Basil, chopped - OR - 1 tbsp Dried Basil
1/4 cup Olive Oil, or as needed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sliced tomatoes, peppers, basil (fresh or dried), garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
2. Boil the rigatoni in salted water until al dente. Drain well.
3. Toss the cooked pasta with the remaining olive oil to prevent sticking.
4. Add the tomato mixture and grated Parmesan or Romano cheese to taste. Mix gently until combined.
5. Serve hot, garnished with additional basil if desired.
